title.en: Edwards leaves football chief role with Liverpool owners FSG
title.zh-CN: 爱德华兹将足球首席角色留给利物浦老板FSG

summary.en: Liverpool owners Fenway Sports Group announce the departure of Michael Edwards, the company's chief executive of football.
summary.zh-CN: 利物浦老板芬威体育集团宣布公司足球首席执行官迈克尔·爱德华兹离职。

title.en: 'What old-timers can do' - the evolution of Belgium's golden generation
title.zh-CN: “老一辈人能做什么” --比利时黄金一代的演变

summary.en: BBC Sport explores what is behind Belgium's progress to the last eight of the World Cup, and whether they were too easily discounted among the contenders.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育频道（ BBC Sport ）探讨了比利时在世界杯最后八场比赛中取得进展的背后原因，以及它们在竞争者中是否太容易被打折。

title.en: Jesus reunites with Ronaldo as new Portugal head coach
title.zh-CN: 耶稣与罗纳尔多重聚，成为葡萄牙新任主教练

summary.en: Jorge Jesus is named Portugal's new head coach on a four-year contract to run through to the 2030 World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 豪尔赫·耶稣（ Jorge Jesus ）被任命为葡萄牙新任主教练，签订了一份为期四年的合同，直至2030年世界杯。

title.en: Mexico boss' explicit heckle a bit of fun - Gordon
title.zh-CN: 墨西哥老板直言不讳的嘲笑-戈登

summary.en: England winger Anthony Gordon says being sworn at by Mexico boss Javier Aguirre in a viral moment of their World Cup match was "just a bit of fun".
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰边锋安东尼·戈登（ Anthony Gordon ）表示，在世界杯比赛的病毒时刻，墨西哥老板哈维尔·阿吉雷（ Javier Aguirre ）宣誓就职“只是有点好玩”。

title.en: How De la Fuente's Spain are closing in on greatness
title.zh-CN: De la Fuente的西班牙是如何接近伟大的

summary.en: Before Spain's World Cup quarter-final against Belgium, Guillem Balague talks to Spain boss Luis de la Fuente about their identity and Lamine Yamal.
summary.zh-CN: 在西班牙世界杯四分之一决赛对阵比利时之前， Guillem Balague与西班牙老板Luis de la Fuente谈论了他们的身份和Lamine Yamal。

title.en: England defender Charles joins Man City from Chelsea
title.zh-CN: 英格兰后卫查尔斯从切尔西加盟曼城

summary.en: Manchester City have signed England international Niamh Charles for £500,000 from Women's Super League rivals Chelsea.
summary.zh-CN: 曼城以50万英镑的价格从女子超级联赛的竞争对手切尔西手中签下了英格兰国脚尼亚姆·查尔斯。

title.en: Are stuttering penalties clever or a fail? Stats suggest they are a no-no
title.zh-CN: 口吃惩罚是明智的还是失败的？统计数据表明他们是禁忌

summary.en: Kylian Mbappe's penalty miss in France's win against Morocco is the latest example of a player missing a penalty after stuttering in the run-up.
summary.zh-CN: 基利安·姆巴佩（ Kylian Mbappe ）在法国对摩洛哥的胜利中的点球失误是球员在晋级赛中口吃后错过点球的最新例子。

title.en: France cruise into semi-finals - are they best-ever version of Les Bleus?
title.zh-CN: 法国队进入半决赛-他们是Les Bleus有史以来最好的版本吗？

summary.en: World Cup winners in 1998 and 2018, France have created another special team and in beating Morocco showed why they are favourites to win the 2026 competition.
summary.zh-CN: 在1998年和2018年的世界杯冠军中，法国组建了另一支特别的球队，在击败摩洛哥的比赛中，他们展示了为什么他们最喜欢赢得2026年的比赛。

title.en: West Ham sign forward Salmon on two-year deal
title.zh-CN: 西汉姆签下前锋鲑鱼两年合约

summary.en: West Ham have signed England forward Ebony Salmon on a two-year deal following her exit from Aston Villa.
summary.zh-CN: 西汉姆联队在退出阿斯顿维拉后与英格兰前锋乌木三文鱼签下了一份为期两年的合同。

title.en: Duran completes switch to Celtic from Qarabag
title.zh-CN: 杜兰完成从卡拉巴格到凯尔特语的转换

summary.en: Celtic confirm the signing of Colombian forward Camilo Duran from Qarabag on a five-year deal.
summary.zh-CN: 凯尔特人确认哥伦比亚前锋卡米洛·杜兰（ Camilo Duran ）从卡拉巴格（ Qarabag ）签下了一份为期五年

title.zh-CN: 马刺为Kolo Muani出价-周五八卦

summary.en: Tottenham make an offer for Randal Kolo Muani but Juventus remain favourites to sign the forward, Arsenal are ready to finalise a deal for Christos Tzolis, Marcus Rashford's future at Barcelona could...
summary.zh-CN: 托特纳姆热刺向兰德尔·科洛·穆阿尼提出要约，但尤文图斯仍然是签下前锋的最爱，阿森纳已经准备好为克里斯托斯·佐利斯敲定一笔交易，马库斯·拉什福德在巴塞罗那的未来可能会...

title.en: New Celtic arrival Duran eyes further Champions League impact
title.zh-CN: 新凯尔特人抵达杜兰进一步关注冠军联赛的影响

summary.en: Celtic confirm the signing of Colombian forward Camilo Duran from Qarabag on a five-year deal.
summary.zh-CN: 凯尔特人确认哥伦比亚前锋卡米洛·杜兰（ Camilo Duran ）从卡拉巴格（ Qarabag ）签下了一份为期五年

title.en: 'A bit of a rebel' - what can Celtic expect from forward Duran?
title.zh-CN: “有点叛逆” --凯尔特人对前锋杜兰有什么期望？

summary.en: Celtic are set to sign their first player in the transfer window - 24-year-old Colombian forward Camilo Duran from Qarabag - for a reported £5.5m. But who is he?
summary.zh-CN: 凯尔特人将在转会窗口签下他们的第一名球员-来自卡拉巴格的24岁哥伦比亚前锋卡米洛·杜兰-据报道为550万美元£。但他是谁？

title.en: Guehi a serious doubt for quarter-final - could Burn start vs Norway?
title.zh-CN: 对于四分之一决赛来说， Guehi是一个严重的疑问- Burn能否首发对挪威？

summary.en: Marc Guehi is a serious doubt for England’s World Cup quarter-final on Saturday against Norway as he battles a hamstring strain picked up in the win over Mexico.
summary.zh-CN: 马克·盖希（ Marc Guehi ）在周六对阵挪威的比赛中对英格兰世界杯四分之一决赛表示严重怀疑，因为他在战胜墨西哥的比赛中与腿筋拉伤作斗争。

title.en: Mbappe mirrors Messi magic as World Cup's greatest storyline rolls on
title.zh-CN: Mbappe镜像梅西的魔力，世界杯最伟大的故事情节继续

summary.en: This summer's World Cup has been one of the most fascinating on the pitch in recent memory. Not because of the teams. Because of two men.
summary.zh-CN: 今年夏天的世界杯是最近记忆中球场上最迷人的比赛之一。不是因为团队。因为两个男人。
